purpose: Deterministic topic disambiguation for the router. Match request signals to exactly one enum.

topics.not_this_if: request is about on-page copy (-> seo-content) or README/navigation audit (-> indexability-validator)
request is keyword research (out of scope) or rendering/canonical infra (-> seo-architecture)
request critiques an existing page (-> landing-pages)

signals: what is wrong with my page
topics.not_this_if: request is to build a new page (-> landing-page-builder)
request is a multi-step pre-launch journey (-> funnel-design) or post-launch diagnosis (-> funnel-analytics, out of scope)
request is single-page CRO (-> conversion-optimization) or measured drop-off (-> funnel-analytics)
request is a full page build (-> landing-page-builder) or page CRO program (-> conversion-optimization)

tie_break: If 2+ topics match, ask one clarifying question; never read two playbooks. Build-new beats critique only when the user explicitly asks to create.
